tightening_rules: one phase validator per bundled phase
phase JSON as source of truth
no standalone prompt artifacts unless complex/reusable/high-risk

phases.purpose: Create review-only source-backed inventory plus risk, duplicate, and status evidence in one bundle.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.phase_name: Combined Teacher Review + Candidate Planning Checklist
phases.purpose: Let Yossi/teacher review candidates and planning suitability in one checklist.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.purpose: Apply teacher and planning decisions together and produce next-gate eligibility.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.purpose: Review eligible candidates for internal packet readiness and preserve holds/revisions.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.phase_name: Protected-Preview Decisions Applied + Internal Packet Readiness
phases.purpose: Apply protected-preview candidate decisions and define internal packet lane.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.purpose: Create internal-only packet and embedded review checklist/observation fields.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

phases.purpose: Apply observation decisions and authorize the next safe task or next-Perek source discovery.
required_safety_fields: protected_preview_allowed=false unless explicitly appropriate for internal protected-preview artifacts
stop_conditions: any safety field is true unexpectedly
phases.recommended_validator_scope: Validate all phase outputs, counts, decisions, held/blocked IDs, next_allowed_task, and safety fields from the phase JSON contract.

prohibited_default_behaviors: standalone readiness report after every small artifact
separate checklist for every tiny stage when one combined checklist can capture decisions
new validator per micro-artifact when one phase validator can cover a bundle
protected-preview packet before explicit decision layer
runtime activation in source/candidate/packet planning phases
standalone future prompt artifacts unless complex/reusable/high-risk
